headline: Assessing LKQ (LKQ) Valuation After A Challenging Year For Shareholder Returns
summary: Recent share performance and business profile LKQ (LKQ) has been drawing investor attention after a mixed stretch in the share price, with a 1 day return of about 0.5% and a 1 year total return near a 21% decline. The stock’s recent pattern includes a 1 week return of roughly a 1.9% decline, a 1 month return of about a 1.4% decline, and a past 3 month return around 11.1%, set against a year to date performance close to 6.8%. Behind the share price, LKQ runs a large vehicle parts distribution...
